description: The Pakistan Super League's 2026 season kicked off with a bizarre incident where the white match ball turned pink due to color transfer from the Hyderabad Kingsmen's jerseys. Former cricketer Kamran Akmal heavily criticized the league over the poor-quality kits, while captain Marnus Labuschagne expressed his bewilderment at the unprecedented event.

'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' BO day 9: Ranveer Singh starrer inches closer to netting Rs. 700 crore
description: Aditya Dhar’s espionage epic, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', shows no signs of slowing down as it enters its high-stakes second weekend. Starring Ranveer Singh as the covert spy Hamza, the film has officially joined the elite Rs. 1,000 crore global club in just nine days, matching the record-shattering pace of Allu Arjun starrer 'Pushpa 2.' The sequel is now poised to surpass the Rs. 894.49 crore lifetime record set by the original 2025 released 'Dhurandhar.'

description: Saalumarada Thimmakka, a humble labourer from Karnataka, transformed personal sorrow into a remarkable environmental legacy. She and her husband planted and nurtured 384 banyan trees along a highway, creating a vital green corridor.

description: National Conference MLAs protested the killing of former Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei and US-Israel military actions in Iran within the Jammu and Kashmir Assembly. The protest led to a scuffle with BJP MLAs, prompting an adjournment. Chief Minister Omar Abdullah condemned the conflict, stating regime change cannot be achieved through military bombardment.

Away from the rumors, O’Neal has also reflected on his personal life, openly admitting mistakes in his past marriage and sharing lessons on honesty, responsibility, and growth.

description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio criticized NATO allies for their perceived uneven engagement in global crises, highlighting US contributions to Ukraine while questioning European commitment to securing the Strait of Hormuz. Rubio emphasized that the strait's security is in Europe's interest, urging them to step up and address disruptions to global energy supplies.

Both leaders indicated that the evolving business landscape, driven by AI, necessitates new leadership for future growth phases. Their departures highlight a significant technological shift impacting executive decision-making at major corporations.

NFL Trade rumor: Chargers linked to $90 m Dolphins star to boost Justin Herbert offense
description: Tyreek Hill trade talk picked up again as the Los Angeles Chargers are reportedly targeting Miami Dolphins playmaker Tyreek Hill, a $90M talent, to address their offensive struggles. A viral post suggested that Hill could join the Chargers or Chiefs after the NFL Draft. Money also plays a role. Hill may not command the full value after the injury. That makes this a smart gamble for Los Angeles. If the Chargers pull this off after the draft, it solves their biggest issue. It adds speed, forces defences to back off, and finally gives Herbert the weapon he has been missing.

Magic Johnson opens up on living with HIV years after diagnosis
description: Magic Johnson recently revisited his journey living with HIV during a conference in Atlanta, offering a candid reflection shaped by decades of experience. From his shocking 1991 retirement to becoming a global advocate, Johnson turned fear into purpose. Supported by his wife Cookie and guided by medical progress, he continues to inspire through honesty, education, and resilience, proving his impact extends far beyond basketball.

description: Detroit's decision to place Kevin McGonigle on the Opening Day roster has created a roster crunch, pushing Javier Báez into an uncertain role.  With his substantial contract, trade talks are intensifying. A potential deal with Miami could see Báez move for prospects, offering Detroit payroll relief and a clearer path for younger talent.

title: Stabbed thrice, 54-year-old Punjab woman fights off intruder posing as delivery agent
description: Sushma Sharma, a 54-year-old resident of Mohali, showcased unparalleled bravery when an armed intruder masquerading as a delivery man invaded her home. Despite enduring three stab wounds and facing a weapon mimicking a firearm, she fought fiercely to safeguard her grandson.

Maharashtra FDA minister Narhari Zirwal in new row as video with trans person in room goes viral
description: In a dramatic twist, Maharashtra FDA Minister Narhari Zirwal finds himself at the center of controversy after a video leak showed him napping in a private room with a transgender individual. Allegations have arisen surrounding extortion and manipulation, as a man claiming to be the sibling of the transgender person has accused them of targeting influential individuals.

title: School headmistress dances to TVK chief Vijay's movie song, suspended
description: A headmistress from Thanjavur district faced suspension after a video of her dancing to a Vijay movie song at a Women's Day event went viral. The action was taken due to alleged violation of government conduct rules. The dance occurred at an event organized by Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam.
